name: Chogajip Korean Restaurant
tagline: Open until 4am every single day — the chive pancakes and kimchi stew are why Honolulu's night owls know exactly where to end up.
parking: Small shared lot off Kapiolani Blvd; street parking on side streets
talkStory: A long-running late-night Korean spot on Kapiolani Blvd, beloved by Honolulu's restaurant and bar industry workers for decades as the go-to post-shift meal destination. Daily 8am–4am. The 2am crowd is its own subculture — service industry workers, night owls, post-bar hunger.
